summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Learning & Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, building scalable processes and programs grounded in evidence, and partnering cross-functionally for sustainable impact. I increasingly use AI and automation to eliminate manual work—through human-centered, systematic design.

bullets.text: Lead {coord|end-to-end program and project management} across 20+ concurrent initiatives, 10+ vendors, and multiple stakeholders—ensuring high-quality delivery on timelines
Run {data|needs assessments} with 25+ {cross|stakeholders} to identify learning gaps and design {prog|new training programs} best aligned with audience needs
Develop {prog|guides, SOPs, and a self-service knowledge base} for 70+ {cross|cross-functional} staff, reducing onboarding time by 75%
Facilitate {prog|live training webinars} for 600+ participants, deepening program understanding and driving a 78% enrollment rate
Upskill an HR team in data analytics to {data|audit 300+ leave cases}, surfacing $362K in costs that drove policy redesigns and first aid training
Conduct focus groups and 1:1 interviews with an NGO leadership team to surface decision-making and {cross|accountability} gaps and recommend process changes
Analyzed 2,000+ {data|employee experiences} to surface satisfaction drivers and guide C-suite decisions on where to focus
Led a manager-effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Prepared and presented insights to senior leadership on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Optimized {ex|onboarding} across 3 global locations via process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities across the employee lifecycle
Supported organizational change by helping direct a Mergers & Acquisitions project, coordinating {cross|cross-functional stakeholders}
Initiated a DEI pilot with an {prog|Inclusive Leadership workshop} for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to 23 other global locations
Assisted in employee relations cases, ensuring compliance with local labor laws and confidentiality
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
